item.title: 8 years ago you gave us a nudge. Thank you.
item.description: 8 years ago you gave us 16,000 upvotes and 483,000 views. That was an exciting day. Today, we hit 17 million downloaded files! We credit all of you dear imgurians for your kindness. It was the nudge to end all nudges. You people are the best! -Randy and Deanna (The OlderGeeks) Edit: Holy smokes! Again? Thanks again, nice people. Send clicks to our website and find something for yourself! https://www.oldergeeks.com
item.dc:creator: oldergeeks

item.title: I don't know what to do with myself, feels surreal.
item.description: I started at my current job in February of 2022 as a temp at $20/hr. After 6 months, I was officially hired on by the company, got a $0.25 bump. Big money. I was told I had just missed the cutoff for their annual reviews and that I'd get one the following year. I've been told I'm doing a great job, I rarely ever see my boss and he rarely needs to check in on me. I'm praised by ither departments. My boss has gotten nervous when I expressed interest in other departments and even downright talked badly about one. It's clear he likes me right where I am. I got a whopping 98 cents at my review, barely over inflation. I started looking for jobs that night. I had an interview yesterday at a union warehouse and it went well. They called me a few hours later with an offer: $25.69/hr plus an additional $1.70 for shift differential (second shift). With the union pay scale, I'll be at $32 in just a few years. I'm beside myself. Unions work, don't let anyone tell you otherwise.
item.dc:creator: DarthPiette

item.title: Joseph Medicine Crow was a bad ass
item.description: Some sauce: https://allthatsinteresting.com/joe-medicine-crow 'Becoming a war chief was not easy — and even less so after the U.S. government had all but eradicated the Indigenous way of life on the Great Plains. The feat required passing four tests, including touching a living enemy, stealing an enemy’s weapon, and successfully leading a war party. Finally, a person had to sneak into an enemy camp to steal a horse. Generations of men passed this test and became war chiefs. But the last feat became all but impossible as Native Americans were forced onto reservations and horses slowly disappeared from the battlefield in the 20th century. And yet Joe Medicine Crow managed to accomplish all four tasks almost by accident, and in a place few members of the Crow Nation had ever visited. He earned the honor fighting Nazis in Germany with the U.S. Army.' To help answer the horse questions: https://www.smithsonianmag.com/smart-news/native-americans-spread-horses-through-the-west-earlier-than-thought-180981912/ Dog pulled Travois: http://www.native-languages.org/travois.htm
item.dc:creator: HorrorMango

item.title: Not all quitters are losers.
item.description: Year 6. 2191 days. At 25 smokes a day (which was easily done) that is 54,775 cigarettes that i havent smoked. I'm still going strong...haven't had one since I quit. Still can't stand the smell or being around smokers. Best decision.... EVER.

item.title: Metalheads of Imgur, A Metal Dump
item.description:
Front Page Edit: Send more music recommendations and who's your favorite band to see live? My wife and I are seeing Static X, Sevendust, and Dope this Saturday. First concert in years, so friggin excited
Fate of Norns by Amon Amarth makes me tear up every damn time
Mick Gordon guitar intensifies
Little late for Christmas but ?‍♂️
Do Unmute!
Not being a gatekeeper, listen to what makes you happy. I enjoy Ghost just fine, I just consider more of a metal adjacent band like Sleep Token (although that's more prog metal I suppose)
Stoned Luna tax. We gave her CBD treats to help with the Diwali fireworks. She proceeded to get lost while standing still and we stacked all her toys on top of her to see whAt it would take to get her to move ?

item.title: 14 Years Sober .......

item.dc:creator: tampacl

item.title: I freaking did it, guys!
item.description: I never thought I could do it! I've been drinking beer here and there and way too much/often for years. I tried many times tapering off, but just ended up picking up my old habits. I ruined everything. My wife cheated on me. I'm getting a divorce, I'm moving out of the house and we've been fighting over custody. I told myself that I have to be really careful with drinking too much in this time of my life - then I found out that my ex is pregnant. At this point it started escalating - I drank too much and started spiraling. I realized what was happening, and I sought help immediately. Everything is on the line! I tapered for 4 days, then figured 'f this' and quit cold turkey! I'm on day 8 now and I'm feeling so damn good, despite everything that has happened lately! It's been a blessing for me, and I'm genuinely happy! I promise you all this - if I can do it, so can you!!! Let me know if you're struggling and in need of help/support! I effing did it!!
item.dc:creator: Ohyesireallydidthat

item.title: No politics. Here's a wholesome dump to feel a little bit better today. Love ya'll.

item.title: Dammit, Jim, I'm a draftsman, not a doctor.
item.description: Just yelling into the void here everyone, avoid the wall of text, best to just move on to funnier memes. My other half developed a problem swallowing food. Food would get lodged in her throat easily, and it would be very hard to get that blockage to move up or down. When she sought out medical advice for this, her doctor apparently went to WebMD and picked whatever needed the most expensive testing and treatment while also fitting her symptoms, and he decided she had something called "chiari malformation". This is where part of the brain protrudes from the bottom of the skull, where the brain stem is. Various scans and tests said she had it but just barely. Borderline case, she shouldn't even notice. But to "fix" the issue, where she could eat normally, would require surgery to open up the hole in the base of her skull, and it probably wouldn't help. Late last year, I tried to research (I DiD mY oWn ReSeArCh!) what other things could cause difficulty swallowing, because jumping right to a condition neither of us had ever heard of without checking anything else was something *I* was having trouble swallowing. It's like saying your car needs a whole new engine because of a misfire, sure that *could* fix it, bit there are more likely causes. Just need to do some diagnosis. And one thing that I found that was easy to test by experiment was allergies. So for two weeks, she tried taking a benadryl half an hour before eating. And it worked. No issues. She can just eat normally. We tried a "control" where she didn't take a benadryl all week, and food started getting lodged in her throat again. The issue went away when she tried the benadryl again. So now we need to figure out what she is allergic to, but that's a much better outlook than "Just have to live with it". And I have to ask, why didn't her doc think of this? What the fuck are his years of education and experience good for if he doesn't try the obvious and the problem is solved by a fucking high-school dropout and his wife? Dear old Dad told me a story about a lighthouse that makes me look for cheap and obvious fixes first, I guess this doctor didn't have parents with that sort of wisdom? What the fuck are we paying so much for?
item.dc:creator: IdiotSavantTinker

item.title: The 402nd vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps
item.description:
Next week is my 40th Birthday and I will be taking a break from Dumping because I am old.
Gotcha
# 3
# 4
Those are rookie numbers.png
My addition
STAY TUNED! I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild Monday-Friday around 11:30 am, GMT-5, in my ""I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's "Follow" Feature, which will alert you whenever one of my dumps goes Viral.
My addition at the bottom.
Squirt
This is my newly commissioned Signature Image, by Dark Arts Studios. He's no longer on The Imgurs, I met him on ElbowDeepInAHorse's Discord Server. Here's where you can see his work: https://twitter.com/Anubis23342060 https://www.furaffinity.net/user/thed4rk1ord/ https://tailsofthegods.com/ https://dark-arts.itch.io/ FUN TIP / LIFE FACT / PRO HACK I upvote 90% - 99% of positive or neutral comments on my posts, as well as ≈50% of negative ones Shoutout to my fellow Dumpers: @DeafKitten @CodyBurkett @OhValleyOfPlenty @AbbiiStabbii @DigiT00l @MemeMuseumCurator @CeleryMan7 @DumpsterKoala @JebidiahBeetus @Kaeldra @KirbyVictorious @HermioneDanger00 @DumpReview @WhiskeyJelly @JasonPositivityPilot @danat101 @PotatoCheesMonk @VanessaNelson @NotMuchBiggerThanAWomprat @MindNumbingBraIncAndy @TheMellowMoron @TheWoodsAreVile @ThatOtherGirlYouKnow @IStealMemesAndStuff @DrWalters @DaymanAhAAAAah Lemme know If you are a Regular Dumper and would like to be added to the list! Archive Of Previous Dumps: Vols 1-300: https://imgur.com/a/vAfF9Wz Vols 301+ : https://imgur.com/a/oDakPaq Updated Whenever I Can Get Around To It #MemeDump #Phone_Dump #Dump #MeeMays #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #SaveTheBees #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #EatingAppsTakingNaps #EatNamesAndTakeAss #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #IfYoureDeadInside #DumpyMcGeeAndGuyNamedSteve #2Dumps1Site #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple

item.title: Ground Hornet Nest Removal
item.dc:creator: lifonaut

item.title: Dentist Phobia
item.description: I don't often do this but need a vent. I've had a phobia of the dentists for years. I've passed out multiple times during procedures because of fear and panic attacks. After a dentist buggered up the extraction and all but destroyed the tooth they had to transfer me to hospital for the extraction as I need to be knocked out as regular sedation didn't work on me. Tomorrow I'm going to hospital to be knocked out so a wisdom tooth can be removed. The surgery kept getting postponed over the last couple years and I think I was expecting the same to happen again. I'm absolutely shitting myself about it. I know I'll be unconscious. I know I won't feel anything but I'm still terrified. It feels so stupid being scared of the dentists. I'm 34 years old for Christ's sake. Viral update: wasn't expecting this to get so much traction. Thanks for all the words of support. It's nice to know I'm not alone with this. I've had about 2 hours sleep at most. leaving to go to the hospital soon. Post surgery update: didn't feel a thing. Was out like a light. Jaw is achey as fuck but no pain. Had more painkillers when I got home so I'm riding that at the moment. Cheers for all the positive messages. You internet weirdos can be quite nice at times!
item.dc:creator: BirdGuyJosh
